body.title: Day 2026-06-28
body.text:
## Done
- D-single-package-reorg: T-collapse-to-single-package CLOSED (shipped-unproven); single-import root live
- D-root-cleanup + D-installer-absorbs-init: 2 decisions designed, 16 tickets filed
- D-all-generations-consolidation: 113 ADC decisions absorbed, 18 palace slates absorbed, 6 architecture intent-points created, ~16.7G dead bulk deleted (home 42G→26G)
- Day-close audit: fixed queue device test mock; all other findings pre-existing
- Tests: 189 passed, 3 skipped after fix
